payload.answer: Architecturally, Brain DB is the source of truth, Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection, and Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Telegram inclusion and optimal cheap high-performance model choice remain open questions.
payload.decision: Brain DB should be the source of truth; Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack should be a strict memory intake agent. Telegram addition and model selection remain open questions.

entity_resolution.reason: No ambiguous entity identity requiring durable resolution was present.

payload.intent: Extract durable architectural preferences and open questions from a chat summary.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for memory.
Cognee should be treated as a rebuildable semantic projection rather than the source of truth.
Slack should function as a strict memory intake agent.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added later.
The cheapest model that still saturates performance has not yet been determined.

details: Preserved two items as open questions.
No conflicting or superseded facts detected.

repair_options: If later confirmed, add Telegram as a memory intake or integration channel.
If later benchmarked, record the specific cheapest model that meets the performance target.
